comment: Requires the gated refund_customer tool (approval='required') registered on support-demo — done in the Phase 18 E2E (2026-07-15), so the skip is off. If the tool is ever removed, this scenario fails loudly rather than silently un-guarding the approval flow — that is intentional.
description: Approval pause: asking for a refund routes the gated refund_customer tool to human approval instead of executing it inline, and no workflow fires in the same turn.

turns.user: please issue the refund to my card, order #1042
